requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard （NC/IEC 62471 where adopted）
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（在采用时的 NC/IEC 62471）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（在採用時的 NC/IEC 62471）

summary.en: Cameroon does not impose an EU-style horizontal mandatory photobiological-safety obligation tied to an Ecodesign-type regulation. Where photobiological safety is assessed, it is through the international method standard IEC 62471 （Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems）, which ANOR may adopt as a Norme Camerounaise and reference within the conformity assessment for relevant high-output or specialty products. IEC 62471 classifies lamps into risk groups RG0 （Exempt） to RG3 （High risk） based on blue-light-weighted radiance/irradiance. For ordinary general-lighting LED luminaires （typically RG0/RG1）, photobiological testing is not routinely enforced as a standalone market-access gate in Cameroon; for higher-output or specialty products, an IEC 62471 risk-group assessment may be requested as part of the safety documentation. French documentation is expected. Verify with ANOR whether IEC 62471 is currently adopted and required for the specific product type.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆不实行与生态设计型法规挂钩的欧盟式横向强制光生物安全义务。在评定光生物安全时，依据国际方法标准 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），ANOR 可将其采用为喀麦隆标准，并在相关高输出或特种产品的合格评定中引用。IEC 62471 依据蓝光加权辐亮度/辐照度将灯分为 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危险）危险组别。对于普通通用照明 LED 灯具（通常为 RG0/RG1），喀麦隆通常不将光生物检测作为独立市场准入门槛执行；对于较高输出或特种产品，可能要求将 IEC 62471 危险组别评估作为安全文件的一部分。须提供法语文件。请向 ANOR 核实 IEC 62471 当前是否被采用并对具体产品类型有要求。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆不實行與生態設計型法規掛鈎的歐盟式橫向強制光生物安全義務。在評定光生物安全時，依據國際方法標準 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），ANOR 可將其採用為喀麥隆標準，並在相關高輸出或特種產品的合格評定中引用。IEC 62471 依據藍光加權輻亮度/輻照度將燈分為 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危險）危險組別。對於普通通用照明 LED 燈具（通常為 RG0/RG1），喀麥隆通常不將光生物檢測作為獨立市場准入門檻執行；對於較高輸出或特種產品，可能要求將 IEC 62471 危險組別評估作為安全文件的一部分。須提供法語文件。請向 ANOR 核實 IEC 62471 當前是否被採用並對具體產品類型有要求。

standards_or_laws: NC/IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems （IEC method standard, adopted as Norme Camerounaise where applicable）
ANOR conformity assessment programme — photobiological safety referenced for relevant high-output/specialty products

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 （Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems）, technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard （T = tuijian, recommended） and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited. Both the Cameroon-adopted IEC 62471 and the Chinese GB/T 20145 share the same IEC 62471 technical base for risk-group classification.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行有限。喀麦隆采用的 IEC 62471 与中国 GB/T 20145 在危险组别分类上共用相同的 IEC 62471 技术基础。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行有限。喀麥隆採用的 IEC 62471 與中國 GB/T 20145 在危險組別分類上共用相同的 IEC 62471 技術基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems （SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006）

gap.en: The photobiological position is similar across the two markets in being non-horizontal: neither Cameroon nor China imposes a uniformly enforced mandatory photobiological gate for ordinary residential LED luminaires. In China GB/T 20145 is recommended-only; in Cameroon IEC 62471 is referenced within the conformity programme mainly for higher-output/specialty products and is not routinely enforced for ordinary RG0/RG1 lamps. Because both share the IEC 62471 base, a risk-group assessment done for one market is technically transferable. Practical points: （1） if the conformity assessment requests photobiological evidence （typically for high-output or specialty luminaires）, supply an IEC 62471 risk-group assessment acceptable to ANOR; （2） RG2/RG3 products require warnings and usage restrictions and should be documented; （3） declared classification and any warnings must be in French. Verify with ANOR whether IEC 62471 evidence is required for the specific product before shipment.
gap.zh: 两市场的光生物立场相似，均属非横向：喀麦隆与中国均未对普通居民 LED 灯具实施统一执行的强制光生物门槛。在中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性；在喀麦隆 IEC 62471 主要针对较高输出/特种产品在合格评定计划内引用，对普通 RG0/RG1 灯通常不执行。由于二者共用 IEC 62471 基础，为一个市场所做的危险组别评估在技术上可转用。实务要点：（1）若合格评定要求光生物证据（通常针对高输出或特种灯具），请提供 ANOR 可接受的 IEC 62471 危险组别评估；（2）RG2/RG3 产品须附警告及使用限制并予以记录；（3）所声明分类及任何警告须为法语。出货前请向 ANOR 核实具体产品是否要求 IEC 62471 证据。
gap.zht: 兩市場的光生物立場相似，均屬非橫向：喀麥隆與中國均未對普通居民 LED 燈具實施統一執行的強制光生物門檻。在中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性；在喀麥隆 IEC 62471 主要針對較高輸出/特種產品在合格評定計劃內引用，對普通 RG0/RG1 燈通常不執行。由於二者共用 IEC 62471 基礎，為一個市場所做的危險組別評估在技術上可轉用。實務要點：（1）若合格評定要求光生物證據（通常針對高輸出或特種燈具），請提供 ANOR 可接受的 IEC 62471 危險組別評估；（2）RG2/RG3 產品須附警告及使用限制並予以記錄；（3）所聲明分類及任何警告須為法語。出貨前請向 ANOR 核實具體產品是否要求 IEC 62471 證據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / not routinely enforced — no horizontal mandatory photobiological gate; IEC 62471 risk-group assessment may be requested within ANOR conformity for high-output/specialty products
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended （non-mandatory） standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualite （Cameroon）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cameroon has no EU-style horizontal mandatory photobiological-safety gate; IEC 62471 may be adopted as a Norme Camerounaise and referenced within ANOR conformity mainly for high-output/specialty products, and is not routinely enforced for ordinary RG0/RG1 LED luminaires. The position parallels China, where GB/T 20145 is recommended-only — both share the IEC 62471 base, so a risk-group assessment transfers technically. Supply an IEC 62471 assessment in French if the conformity programme requests it; RG2/RG3 products need warnings. Confirm applicability with ANOR before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆没有欧盟式横向强制光生物安全门槛；IEC 62471 可被采用为喀麦隆标准并在 ANOR 合格评定内引用，主要针对高输出/特种产品，对普通 RG0/RG1 LED 灯具通常不执行。该立场与中国相近，中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性——二者共用 IEC 62471 基础，故危险组别评估在技术上可转用。若合格评定计划有要求，请以法语提供 IEC 62471 评估；RG2/RG3 产品须附警告。出货前请向 ANOR 确认适用性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆沒有歐盟式橫向強制光生物安全門檻；IEC 62471 可被採用為喀麥隆標準並在 ANOR 合格評定內引用，主要針對高輸出/特種產品，對普通 RG0/RG1 LED 燈具通常不執行。該立場與中國相近，中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性——二者共用 IEC 62471 基礎，故危險組別評估在技術上可轉用。若合格評定計劃有要求，請以法語提供 IEC 62471 評估；RG2/RG3 產品須附警告。出貨前請向 ANOR 確認適用性。

requirement_topic.en: Product Marking, Warnings and French-language Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标识、警告及法语标签
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標識、警告及法語標籤

summary.en: Cameroon does not require an EU-style blue-light-hazard class on a mandatory energy label （there is no Delegated Reg 2019/2015 equivalent）. Instead, the relevant obligation is general product marking and consumer-information requirements applied through the ANOR conformity assessment and Cameroon consumer-protection rules: products must carry adequate identification, ratings, and safety markings, and — critically — the documentation, instructions, and consumer-facing markings should be in French （Cameroon is officially bilingual French/English, but French-language documentation is the practical expectation for the main market）. Any photobiological warnings for RG2/RG3 products （where assessed under IEC 62471） must appear in French. There is no mandatory blue-light class on a national energy label, so this is a marking/labelling-language obligation rather than a photobiological-label gate.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆不要求在强制能效标识上标注欧盟式蓝光危害等级（无授权法规 2019/2015 等效）。相关义务为通过 ANOR 合格评定及喀麦隆消费者保护规则适用的一般产品标识与消费者信息要求：产品须带有充分的标识、额定值及安全标记，并且——关键在于——文件、说明及面向消费者的标记应为法语（喀麦隆官方为法/英双语，但法语文件是主市场的实际预期）。RG2/RG3 产品的任何光生物警告（在依 IEC 62471 评定时）须以法语呈现。国家能效标识上无强制蓝光等级，故这是标识/标签语言义务，而非光生物标签门槛。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆不要求在強制能效標識上標註歐盟式藍光危害等級（無授權法規 2019/2015 等效）。相關義務為通過 ANOR 合格評定及喀麥隆消費者保護規則適用的一般產品標識與消費者信息要求：產品須帶有充分的標識、額定值及安全標記，並且——關鍵在於——文件、說明及面向消費者的標記應為法語（喀麥隆官方為法/英雙語，但法語文件是主市場的實際預期）。RG2/RG3 產品的任何光生物警告（在依 IEC 62471 評定時）須以法語呈現。國家能效標識上無強制藍光等級，故這是標識/標籤語言義務，而非光生物標籤門檻。

standards_or_laws: ANOR conformity assessment programme — product marking and consumer information requirements
Cameroon consumer-protection / labelling rules — French-language documentation, instructions and marking

summary.en: China's mandatory China Energy Label （CEL） under GB 30255 carries energy-efficiency grade and lumen output but does not include a blue-light-hazard class. Chinese product marking and instructions are prepared in Chinese for the domestic market under GB labelling rules. There is no Chinese requirement to provide French-language documentation, and the CN-market label/marking content does not match Cameroon's French-language marking expectation.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255 强制推行的中国能效标识（CEL）载有能效等级及光输出，但不含蓝光危害等级。中国产品标识及说明依 GB 标签规则以中文为国内市场准备。中国无提供法语文件的要求，且中国市场标签/标记内容不符合喀麦隆法语标记预期。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255 強制推行的中國能效標識（CEL）載有能效等級及光輸出，但不含藍光危害等級。中國產品標識及說明依 GB 標籤規則以中文為國內市場準備。中國無提供法語文件的要求，且中國市場標籤/標記內容不符合喀麥隆法語標記預期。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires （China Energy Label — no blue-light class）
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for restricted use of hazardous substances （China RoHS disclosure label, Chinese-language）

gap.en: There is no EU-style mandatory blue-light-hazard class label in Cameroon, so that specific EU labelling step does not apply. The real gap for a Chinese manufacturer is language and general marking: Chinese-language CEL/CN markings do not satisfy Cameroon's French-language documentation and marking expectation. For export, the manufacturer/importer must: （1） provide product identification, electrical ratings, and safety markings consistent with the ANOR conformity assessment; （2） translate user instructions, warnings, and consumer information into French; （3） include French photobiological warnings only where an IEC 62471 RG2/RG3 classification applies. Neither the Chinese CEL nor the China RoHS disclosure label transfers. Verify the current ANOR marking and French-labelling requirements for the product before shipment.
gap.zh: 喀麦隆没有欧盟式强制蓝光危害等级标签，故该特定欧盟标签环节不适用。中国制造商的真正差距在于语言与一般标识：中文 CEL/中国标记不满足喀麦隆法语文件与标记预期。出口时，制造商/进口商须：（1）提供与 ANOR 合格评定一致的产品标识、电气额定值及安全标记；（2）将用户说明、警告及消费者信息译为法语；（3）仅在适用 IEC 62471 RG2/RG3 分类时附法语光生物警告。中国 CEL 与中国 RoHS 披露标识均不可沿用。出货前请核实该产品现行 ANOR 标记及法语标签要求。
gap.zht: 喀麥隆沒有歐盟式強制藍光危害等級標籤，故該特定歐盟標籤環節不適用。中國製造商的真正差距在於語言與一般標識：中文 CEL/中國標記不滿足喀麥隆法語文件與標記預期。出口時，製造商/進口商須：（1）提供與 ANOR 合格評定一致的產品標識、電氣額定值及安全標記；（2）將用戶說明、警告及消費者信息譯為法語；（3）僅在適用 IEC 62471 RG2/RG3 分類時附法語光生物警告。中國 CEL 與中國 RoHS 披露標識均不可沿用。出貨前請核實該產品現行 ANOR 標記及法語標籤要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory （marking/language） — adequate product marking, ratings and safety markings plus French-language documentation/instructions required; no blue-light class on a national energy label
mandatory_status.cn: Not required （blue-light class） — China Energy Label has no blue-light class; CN markings are Chinese-language and do not meet the French-language expectation

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualite （Cameroon）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cameroon has no EU-style mandatory blue-light-hazard class label （no Delegated Reg 2019/2015 equivalent）, so that EU labelling step does not apply. The binding obligation is general product marking plus French-language documentation, instructions and consumer markings under the ANOR conformity assessment and consumer-protection rules. Chinese-language CEL and China RoHS disclosure markings do not transfer; user information and any IEC 62471 RG2/RG3 warnings must be in French. Confirm the current ANOR marking and French-labelling requirements for the product before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆没有欧盟式强制蓝光危害等级标签（无授权法规 2019/2015 等效），故该欧盟标签环节不适用。约束性义务为一般产品标识加 ANOR 合格评定及消费者保护规则下的法语文件、说明及消费者标记。中文 CEL 及中国 RoHS 披露标记不可沿用；用户信息及任何 IEC 62471 RG2/RG3 警告须为法语。出货前请确认该产品现行 ANOR 标记及法语标签要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆沒有歐盟式強制藍光危害等級標籤（無授權法規 2019/2015 等效），故該歐盟標籤環節不適用。約束性義務為一般產品標識加 ANOR 合格評定及消費者保護規則下的法語文件、說明及消費者標記。中文 CEL 及中國 RoHS 披露標記不可沿用；用戶信息及任何 IEC 62471 RG2/RG3 警告須為法語。出貨前請確認該產品現行 ANOR 標記及法語標籤要求。
